skeptic.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity/social-graph counter rather than a distinct 'appreciation' signal, and is trivially farmed via mutual-boosting and alts.
skeptic.cheapest_evidence: 2-4 week manual/shadow trial: rank correlation karma vs XP + reciprocal-pair concentration.

builder.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter (or popularity/collusion contest) rather than a distinct appreciation signal.
builder.cheapest_evidence: Minimal !thanks grant with per-day caps, then check karma vs XP leaderboard rank correlation after 2-4 weeks.

user_value.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter (or a gameable popularity contest) rather than a distinct 'appreciation' signal.
user_value.cheapest_evidence: Shadow-log peer grants for a few weeks and correlate karma against existing XP; low correlation + non-trivial grant volume validates distinctness before any UI ships.

synth.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter (or a gameable popularity/collusion contest) rather than a distinct 'appreciation' signal.
synth.cheapest_evidence: Run a 2-4 week shadow trial in one active server (grants logged, leaderboard hidden): rank-correlate karma vs XP and measure reciprocal-pair grant concentration; low correlation + healthy non-pair grant volume validates distinctness before any leaderboard ships.
synth.report: Panel synthesis: HOLD/BUILD/HOLD all at 0.6; the lone BUILD is 'BUILD minimal experiment, HOLD on full feature.' Reconciled verdict HOLD. Core claim semantic (third non-redundant axis). Strongest failure: distinctness collapse compounded by gameability; anti-gaming defenses push karma back toward activity, worsening redundancy; secondary cold-start/thin liquidity and social-toxicity/moderation load. Falsification: 2-4 week rank-correlate karma vs XP + grant-graph reciprocal-pair concentration + alt/sybil spot test, preferably shadow (leaderboard hidden). MVP cost low; real cost is open-ended anti-abuse layer; don't build sybil defenses before evidence of gaming. Smallest slice: single grant, no self-grant + per-granter daily cap/per-pair cooldown, purely reputational, grants logged day one, leaderboard hidden until distinctness test passes.
